description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The exterior features a combination of white and dark-colored siding, with numerous rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs, and a backyard with a swimming pool and lounge chairs. The house has a main entryway beneath the porch, and the rear opens onto a spacious patio area. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, blending traditional and modern elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, front porch, symmetrical windows, driveway, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, driveway with a car, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and additional trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio area, and symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the gable roof, pool, and both front and back yards.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, single main door, and steps leading from the driveway
